query: UPDATE schedules SET startTime = DATE_ADD(startTime, INTERVAL 2 YEAR), endTime = DATE_ADD(endTime, INTERVAL 2 YEAR) WHERE YEAR(startTime) = 2024;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute UPDATE schedules SET startTime = DATE_ADD(startTime, INTERVAL 2 YEAR), endTime = DATE_ADD(endTime, INTERVAL 2 YEAR) WHERE YEAR(startTime) = 2024;
